nasb.text: But the saints of the Highest One will receive the kingdom and possess the kingdom forever, for all ages to come.’

esv.text: But the saints of the Most High shall receive the kingdom and possess the kingdom forever, forever and ever.’

cnv.text: 但至高者的聖民必要得國，擁有這國，直到永永遠遠。’

ccb.text: 但至高者的圣民必承受国度，并永永远远拥有国度。’
